title: Soulscorch
description: Adds a small amount of life & features to the Soul Sand Valley & more.
body:
![Soulscorch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8728f3825c09cf3e16abb93c3e365e608bf898b9.png)

There's no reason to go to the Soul Sand Valley in vanilla other than to get Soul Sand and Soul Soil. This mod hopefully gives you a few reason, as well as a challenge to harvesting the blocks that make up the biome.

## New Blocks
### Soul Brewing Stand
- An upgraded brewing stand that brews potions in half the time. Crafted with 1 Blazt Rod and 3 Basalt. Fueled with Blazt Powder.
- Texture pack creators: This uses the Brewing Stand UI, except for the fuel bar. I don't know why I did it either.
### Iron Bulb
- Remember the old Copper Bulb that had that 1 tick delay? That's the Iron Bulb's job now. Similar recipe to the Copper Bulb, but using Blocks of Iron and a Blazt Rod instead of Copper Blocks and a Blaze rod. I've also made both recipes rotatable.
### Soul Slag
- Crafted with 4 Soul Cream, this is a soul variant of the Magma Block.

Piglins are afraid of these blocks.

## New Effects
### Soulscorch Effect
- Each time you take damage with this effect active, your max health will go down by half a heart.
- A good night's rest will return your health back to normal
- This effect is applied in the following ways:
  - Stepping on Soul Fire, Soul Campfire, or Soul Slag
  - Stepping in a Soulscorch cloud spawned from a Soul Charge

### Soul Render Effect
- Drinking a Potion of Soul Render will instantly restore your max health back to 20 (or 10 hearts). Potion is brewed with a Soul Cream and Awkward Potion

## Entities
### Blazt
- The Blazt is an undead cross between a Blaze and a Ghast. You'll hear it bellowing in the Soulsand Valley. It will randomly choose a Ghast fireball and a Soul Charge to shoot at you.
- Soul Charges, upon contact with a block or player, will burst into a lingering cloud that applies Instant Damage and the Soulscorch Effect. Watch your feet.

### Soulless
- Resembling a Piglin, they are very common spawns in the Soulsand Valley, standing near-motionless in groups up to 8.
- Breaking any soul-based block while any are nearby, will wake it up, and the Soulless around you will watch you. That's your first and only warning.
- It uses melee attacks that inflict the Soulscorch effect.
- Spawns in the Soul Sand Valley. Piglins are scared of Soulless.

### Restless
- Resembling a Hoglin, they are rare spawns in the Soulsand Valley.
- This mob punishes players for getting damaged in the Soulsand Valley. If you get hurt with a Restless nearby, it will wake up, look for you, and will charge at the player. It will then go back to sleep.
- Piglins are scared of Restless.

## Items
### Blazt Rod
- Dropped by Blazts
### Blazt Powder
- 1 Blazt Rod can be crafted into two Blazt Powder
- Used to fuel Soul Brewing Stand
### Soul Cream
- 1 Blazt Powder + 1 Slime Ball
- Used to brew a Soul Render Potion or craft into Soul Slag.
### Soul Shard
- Dropped by Restless and Soulless.
### Soulward Totem
- Crafted with 5 Gold Ingots and 2 Soul Shards
- Holding it while inflicted with Soulscorch sacrifices the totem's durability instead of your max health.
- Can be enchanted on an Anvil with Unbreaking and Mending.

## And more!

Now with useable .jar files too lol
